aboutParagraphs: hey, i'm raghav. i build on solana across the stack, from on-chain programs and rust tooling to developer education that helps people ship faster.
right now i'm focused on rust, systems, protocol design, and understanding how solana works under the hood. member at superteam india.

bullets: 1,200+ users · AI assistant at 96% accuracy on Solana/Rust/Anchor queries
RAG pipeline over 100+ docs via pgvector · live Rust/Anchor compilation sandbox
1,100+ exercises completed in production, zero bugs
Built 4+ full-stack structural design modules using React, Django, and REST APIs
Developed 2 steel design modules from scratch based on IS 800:2007 with 15+ validation checks
Resolved critical CAD generation and session workflow bugs across 7+ modules
Reduced debugging time by 60%+ through logging, error isolation, and API refactoring
Built a session-based chat persistence layer handling 500+ daily conversations with no data loss.
Built a user feedback pipeline that collected 1,200+ ratings and drove a 15% improvement in model accuracy
Fixed critical bugs affecting 5,000+ users, pushing satisfaction scores from 3.5 to 4.2/5
Cut image load times by 20% by moving delivery to a CDN

projects.name: MPMC Queue
projects.desc: Bounded multi-producer multi-consumer queue in Rust. Mutex/Condvar, blocking + non-blocking modes. 72.3M ops/sec. 13 integration tests. Zero unsafe code.

projects.name: solana-txn-tui
projects.desc: Published Rust crate for exploring Solana transactions and accounts in the terminal. cargo install, Homebrew, or curl. Fee breakdown, instruction details, token transfers. Mainnet / Devnet / Testnet.

projects.name: CPMM
projects.desc: On-chain constant product market maker on Solana. x·y=k for token swaps and liquidity provision. PDA-controlled token vaults. Deposit, swap, withdraw — atomic.
projects.meta: On-chain AMM · SPL tokens · PDA vaults

projects.name: EzDeploy
projects.desc: Self-hosted deployment platform. Push to GitHub, get a live URL on a unique subdomain. Isolated Docker build container per deploy, real-time log streaming.
projects.meta: Zero-config deploys · Real-time logs · Unique subdomains

projects.name: Escrow Program
projects.desc: Trustless on-chain escrow in Anchor/Rust. Deposit, refund, take — secured via PDA-controlled SPL token vaults. Atomic settlement, no off-chain intermediaries.

projects.name: Observer
projects.desc: Self-hosted Solana observability indexer in Rust. Uses WebSocket slot updates plus RPC block fetches, Postgres upserts, and a persisted cursor for crash-safe resume. Built for near real-time network health and protocol risk monitoring.
projects.meta: Crash-safe resume · Idempotent upserts · Protocol risk monitoring

awards.title: Colosseum Codex Feature
awards.desc: Highlighted in official Solana newsletter for developer education impact.
